𝗔𝗟𝗧-𝗦𝗘𝗡𝗗𝗠𝗘 | Direct, secure, and private file transfer between users without relying on cloud services.  🔥 Super Hot!

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Direct, secure, and private file transfer between users without relying on cloud services.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Send anywhere (local networks or across continents)
✅ Transfer anything (any size, any format, verified with BLAKE3)
✅ No accounts or personal info required
✅ Peer-to-peer direct transfer
✅ End-to-end encryption (QUIC + TLS 1.3)
✅ Resumable transfers
✅ Broadcast (share with multiple peers)
✅ Preview before downloading
✅ Fast & reliable transfers
✅ NAT traversal via QUIC
✅ CLI integration
✅ Free & open source


▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 8.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 508 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 30 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Alt-Sendme is a free, open-source file transfer tool that enables direct peer-to-peer file and folder sharing of any size or format. It prioritizes privacy and security through end-to-end encryption and avoids cloud storage, accounts, or personal information requirements.

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/tonyantony300/alt-sendme

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

🔥 𝗙𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄 𝘂𝘀 for daily GitHub projects!
👉 GitHub Open Source: https://t.me/GitHub_Open_Source

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪


🏷️ 𝗧𝗔𝗚𝗦
#blake3 #encryption #file_transfer #hole_punching #open_source

𝗢𝗗𝗠 | Processing aerial drone imagery to create detailed 2D and 3D geospatial products for applications such as mapping, surveying, and environmental monitoring.  ✨ Notable!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Processing aerial drone imagery to create detailed 2D and 3D geospatial products for applications such as mapping, surveying, and environmental monitoring.
📅 Created: Sep 2014 • Updated: Jun 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Generates classified point clouds
✅ Creates 3D textured models
✅ Produces georeferenced orthorectified imagery
✅ Generates georeferenced digital elevation models
✅ Command-line interface for scripting and integration
✅ Available for Windows, Mac, and Linux
✅ Docker image for easy deployment


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 6.2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.3K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 87 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

ODM is an open-source command-line toolkit for processing aerial drone imagery. It converts 2D drone images into various geospatial products like classified point clouds, 3D textured models, orthorectified imagery, and digital elevation models.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/OpenDroneMap/ODM

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

#aerial_imagery #drone #photogrammetry #point_cloud #structure_from_motion


© 2026 - Curated with ❤️ for developers

𝗔𝗜-𝗧𝗘𝗫𝗧-𝗛𝗨𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗜𝗭𝗘𝗥-𝗔𝗣𝗣 | To convert AI-generated text into human-like, academic writing that can bypass AI detection.  ✨ Notable!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To convert AI-generated text into human-like, academic writing that can bypass AI detection.
📅 Created: Feb 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ AI-Powered Text Refinement
✅ Expand Contractions
✅ Add Academic Transitions
✅ Passive Voice Conversion (Optional)
✅ Synonym Replacement (Optional)
✅ Word & Sentence Statistics
✅ Streamlit Web Interface


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 361 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 112 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 3 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Python application, built with Streamlit, transforms AI-generated or informal text into formal, human-like, and academic writing. It offers features like expanding contractions, adding academic transitions, and optional synonym replacement to help bypass AI detectors and improve text quality.

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/DadaNanjesha/AI-Text-Humanizer-App

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗟𝗢𝗡𝗚𝗖𝗔𝗧-𝗩𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗢 | Generating high-quality, long videos from text, images, or by continuing existing video content.  📈 Growing!

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating high-quality, long videos from text, images, or by continuing existing video content.
📅 Created: Oct 2025 • Updated: Jun 2026

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Unified architecture for Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, and Video-Continuation
✅ Natively pretrained for long video generation (minutes-long) without quality degradation
✅ Efficient inference for 720p, 30fps videos using coarse-to-fine strategy and Block Sparse Attention
✅ Strong performance achieved through multi-reward RLHF (GRPO)


✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 672 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 60 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LongCat-Video is a 13.6B parameter foundational video generation model capable of Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, and Video-Continuation tasks. It is particularly optimized for efficient, high-quality generation of long videos, aiming to be a step towards world models.

✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿✿

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/meituan-longcat/LongCat-Video

𝗣𝗗𝗙𝗘𝗫𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗦 | A desktop application for performing various operations on PDF files, such as merging, splitting, extracting content, and format conversion.  📈 Growing!

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: A desktop application for performing various operations on PDF files, such as merging, splitting, extracting content, and format conversion.
📅 Created: Jan 2022 • Updated: Jun 2026

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Merge PDF
✅ Split PDF
✅ Rotate PDF
✅ Extract Text
✅ Extract Images
✅ Images to PDF
✅ PDF to Images
✅ Delete Pages
✅ Add Page Numbers
✅ Edit Bookmark
✅ Merge Invoices


┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 169 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 31 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

PDF eXpress is a Python application designed for comprehensive PDF manipulation. It offers a wide array of functionalities including merging, splitting, rotating, extracting text and images, converting between PDF and image formats, and adding page numbers, making it a versatile tool for managing PDF documents.

┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅┅

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/chianjin/PDFeXpress
